pages.text: $(italic)Create$() is a mod about $(bold)building machines that build for you$(). Everything runs on $(create)rotation$() — a turning force carried through shafts and cogwheels — and from that single idea grows crushing, pressing, mixing, farming, trains, and moving structures.$(br2)This Compendium explains the $(bold)systems$(): how power works, what each machine does, and how the pieces fit. It does not list every recipe — your recipe viewer does that.
pages.title: About this Book

pages.text: $(bold)What's covered.$() Create itself, and the many add-ons bundled in Novus — power and logistics, contraptions, trains, electricity, fuels, and the dozen smaller mods that each add a system of their own.$(br2)Read the $(l:1_power/rotation)Power & Kinetics$() chapter first. Almost nothing else makes sense until rotation, speed, and stress do.
pages.title: What's Covered
